questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If it _____ tomorrow, we will stay at home.'
questoes.explicacao: First conditional: If + present, will + verb.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If I had money, I _____ a new car.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: If + past, would + verb.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If she _____ studied, she would have passed.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: If + past perfect, would have + past participle.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If you heat water to 100°C, it _____ .'
questoes.explicacao: Zero conditional: If + present, present (general truth).

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct form: 'I would travel more if I _____ more time.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: if + past (had).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If they _____ earlier, they wouldn't have missed the bus.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: if + past perfect (had left).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'We will go to the beach if it _____ sunny.'
questoes.explicacao: First conditional: if + present (is).

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'If I were you, I _____ that.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: would + verb (advice).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If he _____ hard, he would succeed.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: if + past (worked).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If you had told me, I _____ helped.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: would have + past participle.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'She would call you if she _____ your number.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: if + past (knew).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If it rains, the grass _____ wet.'
questoes.explicacao: Zero/first conditional – both possible. Zero: gets (general), first: will get (specific).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If I had known, I _____ differently.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: would have + past participle.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'They would be happier if they _____ in the countryside.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: if + past (lived).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If you mix red and blue, you _____ purple.'
questoes.explicacao: Zero conditional: present (general fact).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If she _____ earlier, she wouldn't be late now.'
questoes.explicacao: Mixed conditional: past perfect + would + present (result in present).

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'If I _____ you, I would accept.'
questoes.explicacao: 'Were' is used in unreal conditionals for all persons.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'Unless you _____ studying, you will fail.'
questoes.explicacao: 'Unless' means if not, followed by present tense.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If he _____ more careful, he wouldn't have made mistakes.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: if + past perfect (had been).

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'We would have arrived on time if we _____ the train.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: if + past perfect negative.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If she _____ rich, she would travel the world.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: were (unreal).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If you don't hurry, you _____ the bus.'
questoes.explicacao: First conditional: will + verb.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'I wish I _____ taller.'
questoes.explicacao: 'Wish' for unreal situation uses past subjunctive (were).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If they had left earlier, they _____ here now.'
questoes.explicacao: Mixed conditional: past perfect + would + present.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If I see him, I _____ him the news.'
questoes.explicacao: First conditional: will + verb.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'If she _____ more time, she would learn French.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: if + past (had).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If it _____ so cold, we could go swimming.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional negative: if it weren't.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'She would have passed if she _____ more.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: if + past perfect.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'If you heat ice, it _____ .'
questoes.explicacao: Zero conditional: present fact.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If they _____ me, I would have helped.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: if + past perfect.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If you don't water plants, they _____ .'
questoes.explicacao: Zero conditional: present (general).

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'I would buy a house if I _____ enough money.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: if + past (had).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If she had told me, I _____ known.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: would have + past participle.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If it rains later, we _____ inside.'
questoes.explicacao: First conditional: will + verb.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'I wish I _____ harder in school.'
questoes.explicacao: Wish about past: wish + past perfect.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If he _____ here, he would help us.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: were.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If you had told me earlier, I _____ something.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: would have done.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'If I _____ you, I would say sorry.'
questoes.explicacao: Were for unreal.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If she had time, she _____ with us.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: would + verb.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If we had left earlier, we _____ late now.'
questoes.explicacao: Mixed conditional: past perfect + wouldn't + present.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'If you mix oil and water, they _____ separate.'
questoes.explicacao: Zero/first: will separate or separate. Both possible. Here 'will' is fine.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If he _____ a doctor, he would help people.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: were.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'I would have called you if I _____ your number.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: if + past perfect (had had).

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'If you study, you _____ pass.'
questoes.explicacao: First conditional: will pass.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If they had won the lottery, they _____ rich.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: would have been (past result).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If I _____ you, I would accept the job.'
questoes.explicacao: Were.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'If it _____ tomorrow, we'll cancel the picnic.'
questoes.explicacao: First conditional: present tense in if-clause.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'She would be happier if she _____ a better job.'
questoes.explicacao: Second conditional: if + past (had).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'If we had known, we _____ come earlier.'
questoes.explicacao: Third conditional: would have + past participle.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct: 'I wish I _____ more time to relax.'
questoes.explicacao: Wish about present: wish + past simple.
